scripts.dev: node -e "const { spawn } = require('node:child_process'); const useWebpack = process.env.NEXT_DEV_WEBPACK === '1' || process.env.NEXT_DEV_WEBPACK === 'true' || process.env.GITHUB_ACTIONS === 'true'; const args = ['dev', ...(useWebpack ? ['--webpack'] : [])]; const child = spawn('next', args, { stdio: 'inherit', shell: true }); child.on('exit', (code) => process.exit(code ?? 1));"
